meaning: n.鍏ぞvi.瀵嗗垏鑱旂郴,璋堝績
examples: The numbers of the commune were swollen by political refugees.
A group of artists founded a commune in southern Colorado called "Drop City".
The Caesarstone wealth means that Kibbutz Sdot Yam can easily keep functioning as a commune.
The capital has the status not just of a commune but also of a department.
